channel.title: Causal AI daily picks
channel.description: Top-5 daily picks from new research, engineering posts, and tools across causal inference, causal ML, causal language models, and online experimentation.

item.title: Causal AI daily picks — 2026-05-08
item.description: 1. Adaptive Parallel Reasoning: The Next Paradigm in Efficient Inference Scaling — Causal LMs · score 57 · BAIR Blog (UC Berkeley AI Research) 2. BiomedSciAI/causallib v0.10.0 — Other · score 55 · BiomedSciAI/causallib releases 3. amazon-science/azcausal v0.2.5 — VERSION 0.2.5 — Other · score 55 · amazon-science/azcausal releases 4. A Large Scale Benchmark for Uplift Modeling — Uplift / HTE · score 44 · Semantic Scholar: uplift modeling · E. Diemert 5. web3guru888/ATLAS — Active-inference Training with Learned Adaptive Stigmergy — Pure Rust AGI framework, 21 crates, 565 tests, 28… — Other · score 30 · GitHub topic:causal-inference
